parameters.query:
INSERT INTO loan_products (product_name, provider, interest_rate, min_income, min_credit_score, min_age, max_loan_amount, source_url, last_updated)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
ON CONFLICT (product_name, provider) 
DO UPDATE SET
  interest_rate = EXCLUDED.interest_rate,
  min_income = EXCLUDED.min_income,
  min_credit_score = EXCLUDED.min_credit_score,
  last_updated = EXCLUDED.last_updated;
